rows.prompt: ICTRANS A figure in a white knit balaclava and bright red hoodie leans against the hood of a blue car in a dusky parking lot, cradling a black motorcycle helmet in red-gloved hands. The scene transforms.

ICTRANS A young blonde woman in black cat-eye sunglasses and a white rhinestone-lettered tank top holds an orange lollipop to her mouth in bright sunlight, standing before the huge gray shutter doors of an industrial warehouse. The scene transforms.

ICTRANS A woman with a black bowl cut and wire glasses crouches on green parkland grass in a black sleeveless dress and long black gloves, holding an open black folding fan beside her head under a clear blue sky. The scene transforms.
ICTRANS A man with a beard and glasses, wearing a yellow beanie, a cream-colored sweater, and yellow trousers, sits in a cream armchair reading a book in a warm, sunlit room. The scene transforms.
